extra.message: User-supplied 'ip' parameter from request.args is passed directly to subprocess.check_output() without any validation or sanitization. An attacker can inject command arguments or control the target of the ping command through DNS resolution.

cwe: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')

extra.message: Untrusted data from request.data is passed directly to pickle.loads() without any validation. An attacker can craft a malicious pickle payload to achieve arbitrary code execution on the server.

User-supplied 'id' parameter from request.args is concatenated directly into a SQL query string without any parameterization or escaping. This allows classic SQL injection attacks where an attacker can manipulate the query logic.

cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
